programme.desc: When a new Xingo app mysteriously appears on Gwen's tablet, Ben can't help himself and activates it despite his cousin's disapproval, springing a trap that transports Ben in the animated world and Xingo back in the real world. It's the ol' switcheroo!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Forever Knight finally assembles his Round Table of young but super-powerful Knights, including-- Ben?! With Ben's help, Forever Knight leads his new minions in an all-out attack on a Particle Accelerator - his true intention to transform it into a Time Machine and conquer history!

programme.desc: When Zombozo hypnotizes Grandpa Max's entire baking class, it is up to Ben and Gwen to clean up the mess, but it gets even messier when Zombozo unveils his new bodyguard: Kevin 11!

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Phoebe’s Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate it - perfectly. programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper’s ceramic dragon is smashed, the Dews must find all the pieces. programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Marty accidentally “steals” a pair of slippers from a department store, he plans an elaborate “heist” to return them and learns in the end that it’s easier to own up to your mistakes than to cover them up.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a litter of hedgehogs are temporarily relocated to the habitat, Alex, Marty, Melman, and Gloria become their “babysitters.” The mischievous hedgies quickly wreak total havoc in the habitat—and worse yet, Alex must sacrifice his plans to crash a photoshoot for the zoo’s pamphlet cover when the baby hedgies find the travel tunnels and sneak out for an urban adventure of their own! After an “Adventures in Babysitting”-style citywide hedgehog chase, our gang—with a newfound sense of responsibility—ultimately locates the hedgehogs and learn that babies can be a lot of work, but also a whole lot of fun. And Alex gets his dream pamphlet cover—surrounded by the adorable baby hedgies!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch play Scooch’s favorite board game outside, using the whole town of Pawston as the board. \Tag thinks it’s time for an update to the Pawston City Anthem, which inspires a city-wide music competition where competitors will create and perform new Pawston anthems.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag is left in charge of the Pawston Pawtomotive for the day, Frank and Beans open up a rival garage and take all the business. But when all the cars around Pawston break down because of Frank's shoddy mechanic work, Tag and Scooch have to go around town to fix all his mistakes. \ Scooch wants to be a Tail-kwondo master like his hero, Master Wag, but he can't break a biscuit with his tail. Tag helps train him (and his tail), and they even track down Master Wag who gives Scooch a good luck charm. But when Scooch loses the good luck charm before his tail-kwondo test, he needs to find a way to believe in himself.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.desc: A young Asian-American martial artist is forced to participate in a brutal formal street-fighting competition.

programme.title: The Late Bloomer
programme.desc: The story of an adult male who, after the successful removal of a benign tumor resting against his pituitary gland, experiences all the changes and effects of puberty over a three-week period.

programme.title: 3 Am Part 3
programme.desc: Three different short movies revolving around a similar theme: a sinister presence when the clock strikes 3.00 am.

programme.title: Man of Men
programme.desc: A college freshman discovers a dark secret about the sorority house she's pledging for after a series of murders terrorize the campus.

programme.title: Winners and Sinners
programme.desc: Five parolees swear they will reform, while an underworld boss decides to reactivate his counterfeit money business

programme.title: Bleeding Heart
programme.desc: A yoga instructor looks to protect her sex-worker sister from her deadbeat boyfriend.

programme.title: Iron Monkey
programme.desc: A martial artist/doctor steals from the corrupt authorities as a masked thief to give to the poor while another martial artist/doctor is forced to hunt him down.

programme.title: Ashfall
programme.desc: When the stagnant volcano on Baekdu suddenly erupts, A group from across the Korean peninsula was formed to prevent another eruption that may destroy the whole Korea

programme.title: Kiss and Spell
programme.desc: When a ghost-fearing magician falls for his staffer, who happens to be haunted by her dead best friend, he must face his fears while convincing her he'd make an excellent boyfriend.

programme.title: The Young Master
programme.desc: After failing in a Lion Dance competition, Dragon is sent away from school to find his errant brother.

programme.title: Tully
programme.desc: A struggling mother of three forms an unexpected bond with the night nanny hired to help with her newborn baby.

programme.title: Brick Mansions
programme.desc: An undercover Detroit cop navigates a dangerous neighborhood that's surrounded by a containment wall with the help of an ex-con in order to bring down a crime lord and his plot to devastate the entire city.

programme.title: The Roundup: No Way Out
programme.desc: Seven years after the roundup in Vietnam, Ma Seok-do joins a new squad to investigate a murder case. He soon starts to dig deeper when he finds out the case involves a synthetic drug and a gang of thugs.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: Meet some late-life lovers and explore the reasons behind their sexual longevity and their ability to reproduce well into their later years.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: What does it take to maintain alpha status as animals grow older? We investigate the responsibilities and challenges that come with being a senior leader of a pack.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: We explore the integral role that older animals play in their communities and investigate how animals learn over the course of their lives.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: Human, plant, animal, bacteria, all have one inevitable thing in common; death. In this episode we discover the ways in which aging animals defy our usual understanding of the circle of life.

programme.title: Jaguarland
programme.desc: Explore a 400 square mile region of the Pantanal where jaguars rule and life follows the seasonal rhythm of the water.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: In this episode we meet some animal elders who help us understand the psychological mechanisms associated with long life and the positive social value long-lived animals bring to their communities.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episode, a warthog retrieval mission goes awry. Meet the matriarch of Imire, a wonderful elephant that has a unique story. It’s time to say farewell to the Imire family.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard meet Tim Ellis. A young CEO, Tim is the founder of Relativity Space, the company that built and launched the world’s first 3D printed rocket.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard are given unprecedented access to one of the world’s most guarded artworks: James Turrell’s Roden Crater. Inside the volcanic crater, the art explores the use of light and the cosmos.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard meet Omar Bailey, a shoe designer revolutionizing sneaker culture. Omar’s FCTRY LAb has created innovative shoes for musicians and athletes. Now, he’ll create a boot inspired by ARCH.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard meet Tim Ellis. A young CEO, Tim is the founder of Relativity Space, the company that built and launched the world’s first 3D printed rocket.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episoden the volunteers experience close up encounters with iconic creatures. Immersion into Imire’s anti-poaching efforts. And, nothing stands in the way of hard work.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: Human, plant, animal, bacteria, all have one inevitable thing in common; death. In this episode we discover the ways in which aging animals defy our usual understanding of the circle of life.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Meet the new wild warrior volunteers, as they are introduced to Imire’s extended animal family. Getting dirty is part of the job. And of course, there are always striking surprises at any moment.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episode, we witness a desperate mission to save a spooked impala. The intelligence of these anti poaching elephants astounds everyone. And, there is always time for fun tasks.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episoden the volunteers experience close up encounters with iconic creatures. Immersion into Imire’s anti-poaching efforts. And, nothing stands in the way of hard work.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Volunteers explore the community’s role in conservation, with thrilling honey harvesting, a new addition to the team, and a dream come true as one feeds a black rhino.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is in the Franschhoek Valley, exploring the endless bounty of Boschendal Wine Estate.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Continuing to listen to his heart, Warren deepens his love of wine by venturing to the lesser known town of Hermanus, where he’ll visit Newton Johnson, the ‘wine farm with a view’.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is heading out of Cape Town into the more quiet coastal area of the Western Cape, and the picturesque town of Paternoster. It’s here he’ll marvel at the seaside village feel and take an e-bike ride along the beach.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: As the final stanza in Warren’s Food Trail of South Africa, he’s back in the bush, a quintessential part of all travel to the rainbow nation.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren commences his second Food Trail of South Africa in the world famous Kruger National Park and surrounds.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Johannesburg - the gateway city to exploring South Africa! In this episode Warren indulges in the vibrant international flavours and surrounds of the Sandton neighbourhood, loved by locals and visitors alike.

programme.title: David Attenborough: A Life On Earth
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough, a legendary communicator and educator, has traveled the world for over six decades, inspiring millions with his captivating storytelling and bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: With over 50 years in the industry, not many filmmakers can boast the longevity and influence of Steven Spielberg, whose journey from the suburbs of Arizona to the spotlight of Hollywood is one of the greatest stories ever told.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: 60 years since his directorial debut, Martin Scorsese's life has been dedicated to the past, present and future of cinema. Named Caretaker of Cinema, Martin Scorsese continues to push the boundaries of moviemaking.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: In this episode we explore animal communication and reveal the incredible adaptations that enable animals to ‘talk’ to each other.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: Examining nature’s most sociable animals, unveiling the surprising and incredible behaviours that have evolved in response to cohabitation.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: Showcasing some of nature’s most incredible animal minds, whose brains demonstrate high intelligence, enabling them to gain advantage of their competition.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: In this episode we explore why and how animals fight and reveal the ways in which they are programmed to survive at all costs.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s primate team prepare to welcome a new birth.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s vet team commences critical care to save the life of an endangered sea turtle snared on a fishing line, and after 3 years without tigers at the Zoo, the team stand by to welcome a new big cat.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: We follow Auckland Zoo’s bird team into the wilds of the Coromandel Ranges as they help to save native kiwi populations, It’s a feeding frenzy for the Tasmanian devils and the elephant team faces their biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, there's shocking news for the elephant team, the vets are concerned about one of their rescued Little penguins, and we find out how it really does take a community to feed the Zoo.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men Of Advertising
programme.desc: See how advertisers used a new optimism and new technology to sell big in the "Greed is Good" era.

programme.title: Gameplay: The Story Of The Videogame Revolution
programme.desc: Gameplay is a feature on the history of videogames. From Pong to Pac Man, Super Mario to Lara Croft, Doom, Grand Theft Auto and beyond, we chronicle the remarkable story of the fastest evolving new media of all time.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secrets of the Furious Five
programme.desc: Po and the Furious Five face Shifu's biggest challenge yet as they discover it takes a lot more than fast feet and fists to become a kung fu master.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secrets of the Masters

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda Holiday Special
programme.desc: Po prepares for his favorite holiday, the Winter Feast and learns the true meaning of tradition, community and family.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: The Dinotrux get caught in a powerful sandstorm that stops them in their tracks, which leaves Ty Rux and the Reptools to find a way to save them.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When the Dinotrux settle together in the crater, D-Structs decides to go after their most important resource: the Reptools.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: The snails and Tito travel to Tokyo to film a commercial and Turbo is challenged to a drift race against a beautiful and mysterious female cricket.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: In order to investigate one of Skidmark's conspiracy theories, Turbo and Skid join a dangerous underground zip line race/The crew is surprised when Whiplash enters the town's annual Tomato Games. Turbo discovers that Whiplash is really trying to keep an eye on an untrustworthy snail who is Whiplash's former mentor.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Accidental Hero In order to win the Fright Stuff Award, Casper consults his uncles for scaring advice. Rich Kid Ra When Ra pulls up to Scare School in a solid gold chariot, everyone suddenly wants to be his best friend.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Dragon Quest The unlucky staff of a medieval-themed restaurant in Deedstown, get an unfriendly visit from Professor Thurdigree Burns. Opposite Day When Wolfie's experiment with moonlight goes awry, everyone but Casper turns into his or her opposite.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Phoebe’s Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate it - perfectly. But they learn that you don't have to be perfect to show your gratitude for someone. / When Athena finds herself a little short-handed at the Fairhaven Summer Fair, her cousin, Reed, comes to help; only to give Athena more problems to fix.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper’s ceramic dragon is smashed, the Dews must find all the pieces. But when a piece ends up missing, the Dews work together to create a new piece, hoping no one will notice. / Dylan goes to great lengths to invite his Dew Drop to his soccer game but, in the process, learns that sometimes believing in something is more powerful than seeing something.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Marty accidentally “steals” a pair of slippers from a department store, he plans an elaborate “heist” to return them and learns in the end that it’s easier to own up to your mistakes than to cover them up.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a litter of hedgehogs are temporarily relocated to the habitat, Alex, Marty, Melman, and Gloria become their “babysitters.” The mischievous hedgies quickly wreak total havoc in the habitat—and worse yet, Alex must sacrifice his plans to crash a photoshoot for the zoo’s pamphlet cover when the baby hedgies find the travel tunnels and sneak out for an urban adventure of their own! After an “Adventures in Babysitting”-style citywide hedgehog chase, our gang—with a newfound sense of responsibility—ultimately locates the hedgehogs and learn that babies can be a lot of work, but also a whole lot of fun. And Alex gets his dream pamphlet cover—surrounded by the adorable baby hedgies!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch play Scooch’s favorite board game outside, using the whole town of Pawston as the board. \Tag thinks it’s time for an update to the Pawston City Anthem, which inspires a city-wide music competition where competitors will create and perform new Pawston anthems.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag is left in charge of the Pawston Pawtomotive for the day, Frank and Beans open up a rival garage and take all the business. But when all the cars around Pawston break down because of Frank's shoddy mechanic work, Tag and Scooch have to go around town to fix all his mistakes. \ Scooch wants to be a Tail-kwondo master like his hero, Master Wag, but he can't break a biscuit with his tail. Tag helps train him (and his tail), and they even track down Master Wag who gives Scooch a good luck charm. But when Scooch loses the good luck charm before his tail-kwondo test, he needs to find a way to believe in himself.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Mr. Tanaka is moving places all by himself, so Team Zenko step in to assist, and learn the importance of asking people for help. / When Sam's skateboard competition falls on the same day as her favourite creator Ken KaBlam's comic book signing, TZG secretly prevents him leaving town before she gets the chance to meet him.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When easily-distracted Luis is tasked with getting flowers for his grandmother's birthday party, TZG secretly keeps him on track. / When Rodney's honey bees escape from their apiary (artificial beehive), TZG secretly brings them back.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Burple and Winger each injure a wing while they're with Dak, and only teamwork can get them home. At the roost, Cutter gets stuck in a puddle of goo.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders have a "Dragon Day" to show their skills to a young fan, but Aggro skips it to hang out with her new fun -- but reckless -- friends.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: Jindiao takes Po and the kids hostage in an attempt to locate the Wellspring

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Grug thinks his forehead looks too big in Ugga's family portrait, she strives to make the painting disappear.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When the adults exclude the kids from their adult-only cave, the kids make their own much cooler cave, soon making the adults want to switch caves.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Our team’s startup company and their rivals at Baby Corp get in a “Space Race”, competing to see who can make the cutest kiddie-pretend “moon landing” for a baby – a spectacle sure to bring in a bounty of Baby Love. With both companies pouring their resources into a simulated space take off, tempers and sabotage are running hot, and the scrappy little startup is in danger of getting crushed by their big business competitor.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: JJ reluctantly lets Tina take over her assistant duties for the day, but a Tina slip-up leads to an outbreak of town adults drinking diluted special formula that makes them all baby-brained. When JJ discovers this, she works with R & D Baby Simmons and Security Baby Katja to antidote the wobbling “Adult Babies” before Tina can find out and blame herself.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits frames Boss and Tina’s startup company for exploding baby Iggy’s favorite stuffed animal, and Tina is forced to the sidelines to avoid any more bad press. As Crispin expands his plan to burst all the plush toys in the neighborhood, Tina discovers she can stop this by breaking open and rewiring a single toy doll. Unfortunately that doll is Baby Corp’s current head honcho, Pull-String CEO Baby.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Tony spends millions on a new piece of ground for Mike. Parker buys a Golden Goose to turn the season around, and Kevin struggles with a recent hire.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters (S8)
programme.desc: Increasingly desperate, The Mooka Boys beg for scraps in an old mine, but a discovery could change their fortunes. Machinery failures hit The Cheals.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S13)
programme.desc: Vernon's crew attempts their first dive on the frozen battlefield, but tempers explode. Zeke breaks in his season by revisiting a mining spot from his past.

programme.title: Junk Or Jackpot? (S1)
programme.desc: Miniatures and dioramas have overrun the second floor of a woman's home, and she's enlisting Bobby's design help to create space for her grandkids.

programme.title: Junk Or Jackpot? (S1)

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Got The Spot
programme.desc: This program highlights locations that are truly exceptional, blending traditional elements with modern trends. Through the eyes of foreign influencers who thrive on social media, we aim to showcase the unique charm of different regions and generate a wealth of engaging content in this groundbreaking travel initiative!

programme.title: Got The Spot
programme.desc: This program highlights locations that are truly exceptional, blending traditional elements with modern trends. Through the eyes of foreign influencers who thrive on social media, we aim to showcase the unique charm of different regions and generate a wealth of engaging content in this groundbreaking travel initiative!

programme.title: Two Days and One Night 4
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the "2 Days and 1 Night" casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: The Return of Superman
programme.desc: Parenting challenges of "Superman" , the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: My Neighbor, Charles
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me 2
programme.desc: Does age really matter when it comes to love? This dating reality series follows older women and younger men as they move beyond the real-world barriers of age differences in search of true love. The moment they cross the line, a new kind of older-woman–younger-man romance begins—setting a fresh standard for modern dating reality shows.

programme.title: Young Lady and Gentleman
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: Lovely Horribly
programme.desc: This horror romantic-comedy drama is about the mysterious things that happen when a drama writer who sees ghosts meets a top star who plays the main character of her script.

programme.title: Lovely Horribly

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society’s conspiracy. A new drug is invented to boost bodies of the Japanese troops in war and the Chinese students are used in their experiments. Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Filipino actor, model and swimmer Enchong Dee and his celebrity friend Ria, to explore the highs and lows of Hong Kong. They are eager to push their boundaries in this thrilling new adventure.

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian arms dealer to locate and destroy a cache of munitions. However, when he finally finds them, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and must team up with his partner to recover the weapons and prevent a disaster.

programme.title: Iron Squad W

Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: I Am Rage
programme.desc: Erin, a troubled young woman with trauma and anger, travels to a remote estate to meet her boyfriend’s family. The visit turns into a nightmare when she discovers they are part of a blood cult. Abducted and marked for harvest, Erin unleashes a deadly rage, turning the hunt into a brutal fight for survival.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: Leaving her career behind, Celia follows her passion to Italy but faces crisis when her roommate vanishes. Alone, she joins eccentric Aunt Rosato to rescue her friend and unmask the abductor.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2)
programme.desc: Veronica has a huge mango-sized growth on her back that has taken away her zest for life and desire for camping. Dr. Lyndsey returns to help Dr. Lee shape former golf pro Ken's lumpy, bumpy nose.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her take on ribollita, a traditional Italian soup loaded with beans, greens, and mushrooms, served with toasted Tuscan bread.

programme.title: Little Girl In The Window
programme.desc: When amateur photographer Iris notices "HELP" scrawled on a dusty window in a picture she took of a house, she becomes increasingly convinced that the man living there isn't as mild-mannered as he seems.

programme.title: A Boyfriend To Die For
programme.desc: Olivia never wanted to be known as a product of nepotism, but as a rising star in her father's firm, that's exactly how people see her. Determined to prove herself, she meets Jonathan Rothfield.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Big news brings an emotional time to Theresa's family. While visiting her doctor to help manage her menopause, Theresa brings forth her doctor's gushing mom.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Anthony is trying to move on from his troubled past, but his huge thigh lump is holding him back. Mary has a mysterious 70-year-old bump that amazes Drs. Lee and Tomassian.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: In the first elimination round of the competition, twenty-three cooks will show the judges a window into their home life through a favourite dish that they like to cook for their loved ones.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael honours her beloved grandfather by making his recipe for stuffed artichokes. She also prepares Roman-style artichokes, infused with fresh herbs and garlic and then sautéed in oil.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a well-rounded meal of a French-cut rack of lamb, baked with Dijon mustard and seasoned breadcrumbs, and a side dish of brown and wild rice with porcini mushrooms and sautéed spinach.

programme.title: The Ice Rink Murders
programme.desc: After time away from the ice, elite figure skater Megan returns to training, only to find that a killer targeting skaters is giving a whole new meaning to the phrase "cut-throat competition."

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend working aboard a yacht in the South Pacific. As her first voyage sets sail, she falls for entrepreneur Mark.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: Ambitious flipper Leka finds a promising zombie house but lacks the funds to make it happen. Expert flipper James Dainard is intrigued yet sceptical due to the house's poor kerb appeal and choppy layout.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies undertake Operation Overlord, one of the most complicated and massive military invasions in history, to liberate Occupied France and open up a true second front in Western Europe.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Harvey Firestone races to innovation against a crosstown rival as they both bet big on bringing car tyres to the nation. As sworn enemies, they’ll create two of the most famous brand names in America.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: Isolated, deadly, and unforgettable – places like Iwo Jima, Devil’s Island, and Snake Island – these isles are home to some of history’s darkest stories.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Thanks to the industry-defining innovations of three men through the creation of games like Super Mario and Pokémon, Nintendo goes from a struggling playing card company to a video game juggernaut.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's one of the most infamous crimes in American history: the gruesome murder of a young beauty, unsolved for decades. There's a long line of suspects, each more mysterious than the next.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies and Japan clash in the jungles and plains of Asia, the 'forgotten theater' of World War II, as America struggles to bring the fight to Tokyo’s door.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies undertake Operation Overlord, one of the most complicated and massive military invasions in history, to liberate Occupied France and open up a true second front in Western Europe.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies and Japan clash in the jungles and plains of Asia, the 'forgotten theater' of World War II, as America struggles to bring the fight to Tokyo’s door.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Harvey Firestone races to innovation against a crosstown rival as they both bet big on bringing car tyres to the nation. As sworn enemies, they’ll create two of the most famous brand names in America.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: Isolated, deadly, and unforgettable – places like Iwo Jima, Devil’s Island, and Snake Island – these isles are home to some of history’s darkest stories.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Thanks to the industry-defining innovations of three men through the creation of games like Super Mario and Pokémon, Nintendo goes from a struggling playing card company to a video game juggernaut.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies and Japan clash in the jungles and plains of Asia, the 'forgotten theater' of World War II, as America struggles to bring the fight to Tokyo’s door.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: Isolated, deadly, and unforgettable – places like Iwo Jima, Devil’s Island, and Snake Island – these isles are home to some of history’s darkest stories.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's one of the most infamous crimes in American history: the gruesome murder of a young beauty, unsolved for decades. There's a long line of suspects, each more mysterious than the next.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies undertake Operation Overlord, one of the most complicated and massive military invasions in history, to liberate Occupied France and open up a true second front in Western Europe.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3)
programme.desc: These stories take survival to the extreme. Like fending off a black bear while dangling off a cliff. Or drifting through shark-infested waters with nothing but a pair of rubber boots to stay afloat.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S2)
programme.desc: From the strict codes of Hammurabi to the secretly malevolent evil eye, history is full of acts committed in the name of revenge. We uncover the forces that have driven individuals to seek vengeance.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick and Corey race to San Diego to take a spin in the classic car Hell's Chariot, from the movie Grease. Is the flaming hot rod the one that they want, or will they 'drop out' of the deal?

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: Robbie and Jersey go wild for Edd's classic car collection, but he's reluctant to let anything go. Mike has a brush with country music stardom as he combs through the belongings of Hank Williams Jr.

programme.title: The Taiwan Way
programme.desc: Come along for a feast as Chris explores the secrets behind the famous Taiwanese street banquet Bando. Venturing behind the scenes, Chris is stunned by the seamless efficiency of the all-female Bando team.

programme.title: The Taiwan Way
programme.desc: With competition at an all-time high, Chris embarks on a boba-tastic journey to meet experts and discover what it takes to stand out in the bubble tea industry. He starts by sampling classic bubble teas.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5)
programme.desc: In the early 1900s, an underestimated confectioner creates the first wrapped penny candy—the Tootsie Roll. Meanwhile, an unemployed salesman transforms medicinal hard candy into a multipack.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5)
programme.desc: Jaime meets the Finest Female surfer in the Philippines, the Queen of Cloud 9, Nildie Rietenbach. Can she conquer the waves after a single lesson?

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5)
programme.desc: While Jaime heads for Puerto Princesa Underground River through a mangrove swamp, she is offered a local snack – a shipworm from a rotting log.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick and Corey race to San Diego to take a spin in the classic car Hell's Chariot, from the movie Grease. Is the flaming hot rod the one that they want, or will they 'drop out' of the deal?

programme.title: Behind the Yellow Line
programme.desc: A fresh graduate, Paul, strikes up an acquaintance with a pretty young girl, Monica, on the metro. Monica is involved in a love affair with a married man while Paul is also pursued by a rich girl. When Paul vows his true love for Monica, she suggests playing hide-and-seek with him in the metro to decide if they are fated to be together.

programme.title: Duel Of Fist
programme.desc: Fan Ke discovers at his father’s deathbed that he has a half-brother, Wenlie, in Thailand. He goes to find Wenlie, who became a boxer to support his sick mother. Following their encounter, the two got involved in the underworld of boxing match gambling.

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called “Kung Fu Stuntmen”. This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxer
programme.desc: Skilled shadow Tai Chi boxer Ku Ting hides his skills by working as a construction worker. However, when the thugs assaulted his girlfriend, Ku Ting has no choice but to use his kung fu to show his enemies what it takes to keep justice in line.

programme.title: Raging Fire
programme.desc: As the police sets to arrest a drug lord, a team of masked thugs steals the drugs and murders the cops. Inspector Bong is devastated to see the aftermath of the carnage and soon discovers that the killers are led by Ngo, a former fellow cop who was forced into a life of crime by him. As the two men meet again, it is time to settle the score…

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: A heroic tale about Hong Kong's brave firefighters. These courageous men can march into disastrous firegrounds and risk their lives to save others. However, do they have the same courage to confront their personal issues?

programme.title: The Invincible Fist
programme.desc: A dedicated chief constable nicknamed “The Invincible Fist” is chasing after a band of bandits near a village one day and encounters an innocent blind girl. He quickly falls in love with her, but finds out she is the daughter of a vicious bandit. Will he kill the father of his lover?

programme.title: Masked Avengers
programme.desc: A mysterious new gang, the Masked Avengers, is slaughtering the martial world's greatest heroes. To stop them, three fearless fighters must track down the gang's hidden lair in Jingyang Town and put an end to their reign of terror.

programme.title: Brothers Five
programme.desc: The five Kao brothers, separated since birth, are unaware that the master of Teng Lung Manor has killed their father. All five however, vow to defeat the vicious gangsters at the manor due to their bullying ways. After reuniting and with much discipline and hard work, the Kaos are prepared to face Lung and his gang.

programme.title: Lion VS Lion
programme.desc: The traditional lion dance has never looked so good as in Lion VS Lion which captures the most impressive sequences of lion dancing on film. Besides being loaded with enjoyable martial arts chicanery, film historians can revel because it's also the first film that clearly demonstrates the intricacies and differences between the traditional Northern and Southern lion dancing techniques. The Five Venom alumnus and Chang Cheh discovery, Lo Meng, teams up with Liu Chia-liang protege Wang Yu, as they inadvertently turn from vagabond kung-fu school operators into anti-Ching, patriotic fighters.

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family’s massacre years ago. During the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that has been planned for years and must use his skills as an assassin to face whatever comes his way.

programme.title: Return of the Sentimental Swordsman
programme.desc: One of Shaw Studio’s highest grossing movies ever, this is the story of Li Chin Huan, the renowned, charming and sentimental swordsman who must fight many opponents, including an evil Clan Chief, for a place in the martial arts world.

programme.title: My Date With A Vampire
programme.desc: Demon slayer Ma Siu Ling crosses paths with a mysterious detective while probing bizarre supernatural cases. From initial distrust to allies, they join forces against an ancient threat looming over the city. As the blood moon rises, they must uncover secrets of their past lives to prevent a modern-day apocalypse.

programme.title: The Kid With A Tattoo
programme.desc: Young Bao Tong witnesses the brutal murder of his kung fu master by a vicious villain. A large eagle tattoo on Bao’s chest was spotted by the killer as he escapes. Can Bao escape from the killer?

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: This iconoclastic film retells the legend of seven Chinese patriots, who sacrificed their lives to defend against 20,000 Japanese soldiers and 50 tanks for 5 days, at a strategic key point of the Great Wall known as Pa Tou Lou Tzu.

programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Meet people around Japan who strive for a life without waste under the traditional philosophy of "MOTTAINAI," which values cherishing the things we have

programme.title: My Grandfather's Story
programme.desc: Mario traces the life of grandfather, one of the "Japanese holdouts" that stayed in Indonesia after the Second World War. What did he do during that time, and why did he decide to stay?

programme.title: Gourmet in the Park
programme.desc: An oasis in the heart of Tokyo with ties to the post-World War II US occupation, this restaurant has shaped Japanese food trends for over 100 years.

programme.desc: NHK WORLD SHOWCASE covers a variety of genres, including special features and pilot episodes of newly-developed programs.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan Highlights
programme.desc: Come ride with us! Bicycle through the scenery of Japan, stay with locals and discover hidden traditions in a Japan you didn't know existed.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: Mee's Papa cooks and jogs every day. Mee thought he was an ordinary Papa, but Hee says he is strange. So, Mee forms an expedition team and heads out into town to find out what makes a Papa "ordinary."

programme.title: Design Ah neo: Dimensions Special
programme.desc: Design is fun! Design feels good! Cutting-edge images and music guide children to enjoy exploring the ideas and tweaks in the designs all around us. A "Dimensions" special episode.

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Japan's exciting music scene! Pop, rock, traditional and more! Live performances, artist interviews, plus all the latest news.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-15.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Over 70% of Japanese people are said to use eyeglasses. We visit Sabae, in Fukui, where over 90% of Japan's glasses are made, and explore the history of Japanese eyewear and the latest technology.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: A cat takes a nap among the fragrant flowers at a farm that grows sweet pea flowers. Another cat takes a nap at an archery range! We meet more local cats as residents celebrate a unique tradition.

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programme.desc: Appearing to float on the sea, Itsukushima Shrine is built in harmony with nature, changing appearance with the tide. A symbol of beauty and beliefs, its clever construction protects it from the sea.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: Chatroom Japan puts a spotlight on our diverse international community. We report on the issues, speak to those involved, and get a fresh look at what it's like to live in Japan.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The entire Earth is affected by climate change, occurring with a greater speed and scale than ever before. This program uses scientific data and the latest findings to raise awareness on its impact.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Akita / Koike Kazuko (creative director) Nishimonai Bon Odori Festival has continued for over 700 years. Koike finds timeless beauty in the costumes, remade using beloved family kimono.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: We visit a factory in Kobe that has overcome multiple challenges to keep making tasty "ekiben" railway bento (boxed meals) of local delicacies like the famous "octopus trap" and self-heating sukiyaki.

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Locals in Hagi, on a delta facing the Sea of Japan, have lived in harmony with its waters. Beautiful time-lapse footage captures people crossing rivers by boat and canals flowing into homes.

programme.title: Bosai
programme.desc: What does it take to survive a flood? Japan has developed survival skills for floods through experiences such as typhoons. Find out how to safely navigate flooded streets and escape sinking cars.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to mountain. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan

programme.title: The Little Things
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this psychological thriller following two cops, one haunted by echoes of his past, investigating a series of murders.

programme.title: Friends S7 4
programme.desc: Rachel wants to hire a cute, young male assistant over a more qualified woman. Joey's show gets cancelled. Chandler, Monica and Ross tell embarrassing secrets about one another.

programme.title: Friends S7 5
programme.desc: Joey tries to teach Chandler how to smile for an engagement picture with Monica. Phoebe and Ross each date the members of a couple preparing for divorce. Joey takes Tag out for a good time.

programme.title: Friends S7 6
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe compete to be Monica's maid of honor--but Monica doesn't want to make the decision. Phoebe eventually allows Rachel to fulfill the duty. Chandler tries to apologize to a girlfriend from his youth.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 23
programme.desc: A horrible day at work prompts Penny to evaluate her life choices - including her relationship with Leonard. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette struggle to care for Mrs. Wolowitz.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 24
programme.desc: With his entire world changing around him, Sheldon is forced to confront an uncertain future and considers a major move in the seventh season finale.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 06
programme.desc: The guys try to justify getting humiliated at a convenience store, they give conflicting info about their event planning companies at a wedding expo, and the loser awkwardly meets his celebrity childhood crush: Danica McKellar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 07
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Smallville S2 3
programme.desc: After one of his friends discovers Clark's spaceship in the cornfield, Clark defies his parents' wishes and reveals his secret to the person--who gives him a shocking reaction.

programme.title: Smallville S2 4
programme.desc: When the school unwittingly uses red meteor rocks in its class rings, Clark experiences a new meteorite effect.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 16
programme.desc: At a cell phone store, Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix your tablet, and later, he makes a drink that's impossible to swallow. Plus, a dog owner loves that Michael has turned her pet into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 17
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 1
programme.desc: Police takedowns can be risky business when criminals are armed and dangerous. That's why officers rely on non-lethal tactics like tasers, bean bag rounds and K-9 units to subdue suspects.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 2
programme.desc: Watch semi-trucks wreak havoc on roadways, criminals flee cops in pursuit, and crashes, collisions and cars flying through the air -- a dashboard camera can capture it all.

programme.title: Smallville S2 5
programme.desc: Clark becomes concerned when a mysterious poet, Byron Moore (SEAN FARIS), leaves love notes for Lana at her parents' grave. Clark warns her to stay away from Byron, but she is intrigued.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 01
programme.desc: Gather 'round for a most hackful holiday celebration, as Brooke and Kevin demonstrate how to navigate any holiday office party like a pro Elf, and explain how the ball drop became a New Year's tradition.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 02
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke hack their way through the worst obstacles an airport has to offer, and viewers share their DIY solutions for whipping up cream. Plus, Brooke and Kevin find out how low prices can go if you're a "good guy."

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 16
programme.desc: At a cell phone store, Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix your tablet, and later, he makes a drink that's impossible to swallow. Plus, a dog owner loves that Michael has turned her pet into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 2
programme.desc: Take a ride on the dumb side! TruTV is counting down the 20 most moronic motorheads ever caught on tape. You'll see a car cut in half, a bumper-loving pig, and the snow plow driver who makes vehicles disappear. Along for the ride is our hilarious cast of comedians, including Rachel Feinstein, Kevin McCaffrey, Sean Donnelly, and Chris Fairbanks.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 9
programme.desc: Our buyers go head-to-head to score an item that appears to be a covered car. But when the tarp is pulled back, will the winner drive away with a pile of cash or a piece of trash? Then, the legality of a locker's contents is called into question, but Brandon and Lori take a leap of faith and are rattled by what they find. And later, Sean has saved the best for last as our buyers are given the rare opportunity to compete for unclaimed airline luggage. It's an auction of a different breed that ignites a cash spending frenzy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 09
programme.desc: The guys try to kiss unsuspecting strangers (until a special guest crashes the party), they focus-group their absurd life stories as potential movies, and the big loser gets a room-full of enemies while judging a kids' talent show.

programme.title: Titans S1 3
programme.desc: Rachel and Kory travel to the convent where Rachel was raised, while Dick compares his own orphan experience to Rachel's; Rachel befriends Gar Logan.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: Taking place in a dystopian Australia in the near future, Mad Max tells the story of a highway patrolman cruising the squalid back roads that have become the breeding ground of criminals foraging for gasoline and scraps. When his wife and child meet a grisly end at the hands of a motorcycle gang, Max sets out across the barren wastelands in search of revenge. Written by Cole Matthews

programme.title: East of Eden
programme.desc: Hollywood legend James Dean stars in this adaptation of John Steinbeck's classic novel East of Eden. Teenaged Cal Trask (Dean--Rebel Without a Cause, Giant) longs for the affection that his father reserves for his brother Aron, but his efforts meet only rejection. Also attracted to Aron's girlfriend, Cal becomes so frustrated in his search for love and acceptance that he reveals a long-held secret about their mother to Aron . . . knowledge that now tears the family apart.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Trapped in an abandoned house, a young man desperately searches for clues about his trapped situation. The unsettling truth actually lies in a sequence of viral videos and they gradually corrupt his mind…

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jia Hao and his friends gather to celebrate his birthday at a villa. However, the festivities take a dark turn when they connect to a deadly VR game in which they must light candles and dodge ghosts to survive. Tragedy strikes as two of his friends fall victim to the escalating horrors within, plunging them all deeper into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Tear Us Apart
programme.desc: After their young daughter’s mysterious disappearance, Drew and Helen retreat to a secluded woodland cottage for therapy. As they struggle to salvage their marriage, isolation fractures their sanity. Haunted by visions and strange events, Helen can no longer tell what is real as her mind unravels.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes a job as a night guard. When the clock strikes midnight, he reports for duty at an abandoned building — only to find three lost souls awaiting him, and unravels a revenge plot at the same time. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: The action picks up both on the water and off as one of the summer's biggest events descends upon the Lake of the Ozarks: The Shootout powerboat races.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: Behind the murder of a devoted husband lies a dangerous secret—an illicit relationship that transforms jealousy into a deadly plot within one family.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: In Epping, New Hampshire, Sheila LaBarre was known as an eccentric widow who loved her rabbits. But her turbulent childhood, a coma-induced vision, and her husband's death sent Sheila on a mission to kill.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3)
programme.desc: An argument between former NFL player Travis Rudolph and his ex-girlfriend escalates into a gunfight with her brother and his friends.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Tales of toxic love triangles—wives who stray from their husbands with disastrous results, a deadly case of online catfishing, and a lonely young woman who has an affair with a killer.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: 18-year-old Nicole Brown meets 30-year-old OJ Simpson while working as a hostess, sparking a whirlwind romance. Despite appearing as the perfect wife and mother, Nicole endures OJ's abuse in private.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: Spring Valley's Haitian community is rocked when a civic leader is murdered. It takes police nearly two decades to sift through the rumours and solve a mystery filled with lies and dark secrets.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S1)
programme.desc: When the Singapore Police need help, they turn to Lim Chin Chin, the Director of Forensic Chemistry and Physics Laboratory.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S1)
programme.desc: Watch how cyber-sleuths like Erik Laykin crack cyber crimes as well as hiring hackers to tap into the cyber underworld.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Undercover ATF and DEA agents are reminded to never judge a book by its cover and to always be on their toes. Even small-time suspects have the potential to unleash terror.

programme.title: CI Asia: Missing In Bali
programme.desc: When 8-year-old Engeline mysteriously disappears, police, the public and a clairvoyant uncover dark secrets as they search for her.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: A teen gets nabbed for being in the wrong place at the wrong time, while a man who left town with a warrant gets caught when he returns for his aunt's funeral and faces a one million dollar bail.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A 73-year-old murder suspect trashes the interrogation room; a married mother of three admits to a 26-year-old cold case killing; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: Investigators interrogate a prison inmate about an unsolved serial killer case from the 90s; a former police sergeant is questioned about the murder of his mistress; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When a Georgia college student disappears, police open an investigation into a possible hate crime and abduction. However, Dr. Jamie Downs uncovers evidence that spins the case in a new direction.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When the blood-smeared car of 27-year-old Stefanie Watson is found in a Maryland parking lot, her family holds out hope she's still alive.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: In 2019, Jim's daughter, Elesha, lost her job and needed a place to stay so she moved. Moving in with Jim however, dealing with the hoard has been the most difficult part of her life.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: When officers in suburban Indiana respond to a potential kidnapping and murder scene, body cam captures every tense moment of the standoff with the suspect.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st
programme.desc: A sudden illness takes hold of a beloved doctor, leaving her family helpless as the illness takes a fatal turn. The investigation into her death takes her family on a harrowing journey.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: After a construction company boss is found shot dead, no arrests are made. An employee says he'd been bound and gagged by a gang just before the shooting. But 14 years later police charge him with murder.

programme.title: Le Monde De Jamy
programme.desc: Forests protect us from global warming by absorbing the CO2 we emit. But this precious resource is in danger, weakened in particular by heat and droughts. An investigation into the men and women who fight, sometimes at the risk of their lives, to save the forests.

programme.title: Le Monde De Jamy
programme.desc: Habitat, transport, lighting... At a time when we face global warming and the need to save energy, animals often have the solution! They have learned to adapt to the most extreme environments and deploy incredible ingenuity to survive.

programme.title: Demo De Mode
programme.desc: With a predilection for bringing life back to dormant fashion houses, and an unfailing love of elegance: Guillaume Henry presents his autumn-winter 2024/2025 collection for Patou.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Guides D'Aventures
programme.desc: In the small hamlet of Kulusuk, Greenland, the guide Marie-Josee Talbot welcomes hikers from Quebec. The group is ready to walk several hours per day to discover the fjords and glaciers of the coast, the wonders of a still unspoilt environment.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: A Boire Et A Manger
programme.desc: Lindsay Brun, Vanessa Pilon and Remi-Pierre Paquin welcome the actor Debbie Lynch-White and the singer-songwriter Patrice Michaud to a chalet in Hatley. On the menu: local beer, raw milk goat cheese, sushi and s'mores.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: Rosa Kanno, eco-responsible stylist, creates made-to-measure clothing. Rejecting fast fashion, Rosa designs dresses using 3D modeling, which allows her to adjust creations to the clients' body shapes and limit fabric waste. A Franco-Belgian accessories designer, Sarah Levy creates hybrid pieces designed to free the body and adapt to contemporary movement. Committed to local and sustainable production, she works with Brussels workshops to refine her prototypes in leather and recycled nylon.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Strip-Tease
programme.desc: Programme synopsis: A is for Attachment (1/3); A is for Adoption (2/3); A is for Apocalypse (3/3) (2000) Annick, a ''universal mother'', and her Scout leader husband are no ordinary couple. More of a charitable partnership, they welcome children without counting the cost. A child is priceless...

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: A magazine about the people of the sea. An invitation to set sail for a programme rich in voyages, discoveries and fascinating encounters with those for whom the sea is their life, the ocean-lovers and the high-seas adventurers.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Chateau !
programme.desc: In turn, a medieval fortress, royal residence or sumptuous prison, Amboise Castle is quite unique. Leonardo da Vinci even wanted to be buried there! Troussay is the smallest castle in the Loire Valley. Protecting heritage is at the heart of its concerns.

programme.title: Guides D'Aventures

programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!
